creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
And it also does not install the css and template files anywhere.  You
have to copy those from the source tree to use the software.

On Sun, Oct 14, 2012 at 11:20 PM, Vick Khera <vivek@khera.org> wrote:
> Also, it does not install the SVN-Web.psgi file to actually be able to run it.
>
